rag_rules: Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) for branching logic
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in output dependency contracts
Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for input assumptions and output guarantees
generic_rules: Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Use nested if ... then ... else for branching logic
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq for stateful equations and const for constants
Use assume for input assumptions and guarantee for output guarantees
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names like integer or boolean
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
AGREE scalar type names must be int, real, or bool
